settings.addOneToGetStarted: Add one for a more stable experience.
settings.localApiKeyHint: Local apps usually don't need an API key — follow the app's own requirements.
settings.anonymousKeyHint: This service may offer some free quota without requiring an API key. Please refer to the official documentation for details.
settings.apiKeyDisclaimer: This configuration is for reference only,official settings may have changed. Please obtain the API Key through official channels and use it within the scope of service agreed with the supplier. All fees will be settled directly between you and the supplier.
settings.noPresetsFound: No presets found. Edit the presets file to add one.
settings.fontSizeScrollHint: {modifier} + Scroll to adjust in the floating window
settings.shortcutHint: Click to record a new shortcut
settings.modeShortcutHint: Click to record a new mode-switch shortcut (works only in the floating input)
settings.forwardShortcutHint: Click to record a new send-to-input shortcut (works only in the floating input)
settings.opacityScrollHint: {modifier} + Scroll to adjust opacity in the floating window
settings.shortcutInvalid: Must include a modifier (Alt/Ctrl/Shift/Cmd) and a key.
settings.shortcutConflict: This shortcut is unavailable, try another.
settings.translationLangDisclaimer: Please confirm that your selected translation model supports this language.
settings.addOneToCustomize: Add one to customize translation style.
settings.duplicateName: A name with this already exists. Please use a different name.
settings.skillsLiteDescription: Briefly describe what this skill does…

categories.settingsDescription: Theme, languages, shortcuts, opacity and other preferences
categories.providersDescription: Configured AI model providers and their API keys
categories.websearchDescription: Configured web search engines and their API keys
categories.dictionariesDescription: Your custom dictionary entries per language
categories.secretsDescription: Older key store kept for migration

exportData.entryDescription: Back up selected data to an encrypted file

export.title: Export
export.description: Pack the selected items into an encrypted backup file. The password you set here encrypts the backup — there is no way to recover it if lost.
export.hint: Enter the same password twice to enable Export.

importData.entryDescription: Restore selected data from a backup file

import.title: Import
import.description: Analyze a backup file and pick which parts to restore. Anything you select overwrites the existing data of that kind.
import.warning: Selected categories overwrite existing data. This cannot be undone.
import.confirmWarning: This will overwrite existing data and cannot be undone.

reset.description: Delete all user data and settings
reset.warning: This action will permanently delete all your data and settings. The application will close after the reset is complete.
reset.partialWarning: This will permanently delete the selected data. Anything not selected is left untouched.
reset.sandboxHint: Sandbox mode — only temporary data will be affected.
reset.restartRequired: Settings deleted. Restart the app to apply.

floating.emptyPersonaBody: Add a persona in Settings to customize your translation style.
floating.emptyDictBody: Add terms in Settings for more accurate translations.
floating.emptyWebSearchBody: Add a web search provider in Settings to enable web search.

history.title: History
history.clearConfirm: Delete all history? This cannot be undone.

dictionary.rowIsEmpty: Row {n} is empty — fill it or delete it.
dictionary.importModeHint: How would you like to import this file?
dictionary.clearAllConfirm: Clear all entries for all languages?

onboarding.infoBody: Prompit uses AI models to power its features. You need to connect at least one model provider before you can start. Let's set one up now.
onboarding.lightweightBody: Prompit only does small jobs. A cheap lightweight model is plenty — no need to overpay for this.
onboarding.lightweightHint: Pick the cheapest, fastest ones. Your wallet will thank you.
onboarding.selectModelsBody: Choose at least one model to use.
onboarding.doneBody: Setup complete. Close this window, then press {shortcut} to start.
onboarding.shortcutHint: You can add more providers anytime in Settings.
onboarding.addMoreProviders: You can add more providers anytime in Settings.
onboarding.exitConfirm: Setup is not complete. If you exit now, you'll need to go through the setup again next time.
onboarding.searchInfoBody: Web search lets the assistant look up fresh information online. Add a web search provider to use it; until you do, web search stays unavailable. You can also add one later in Settings.
onboarding.searchInfoHint: You can skip this step and set it up later in Settings.
onboarding.importCardBody: Pick a Prompit backup file, enter its password, choose what to restore, and we'll continue setup based on what came in.
onboarding.importSuccessBody: Your selected data has been restored.
onboarding.importSummaryAllReady: You're all set. Click Next to finish.
onboarding.importSummaryNeedProvider: No AI provider found. The app needs at least one to function — the next step will guide you through adding one.

search.retryOrDisable: Please retry or turn off search.
